rewrites: what is the payment period for the renewal premium?
within how many days must the renewal premium be paid?
hypothetical_answer: The renewal premium must be paid within thirty days of the renewal date.

rewrites: what are the consequences of a late premium instalment?
what happens when an instalment is not paid on time?
hypothetical_answer: If an instalment remains unpaid, cover may be suspended until payment is received.

rewrites: does the policy cover replacement of windscreen glass?
is glass damage included in the cover?
hypothetical_answer: Windscreen and glass replacement is covered under the policy.

rewrites: what is the time limit for reporting an accident?
within what period must an accident be notified?
hypothetical_answer: An accident must be reported within twenty-four hours of occurrence.

rewrites: what is damage assessment code D-4471?
definition of damage code D-4471
hypothetical_answer: Damage code D-4471 denotes an assessed damage category.

rewrites: what is the current status of claim CLM-2026-0891?
progress of claim CLM-2026-0891
hypothetical_answer: Claim CLM-2026-0891 is currently under assessment.

rewrites: what notice period applies to policy cancellation?
how many days notice are required to cancel the policy?
hypothetical_answer: The policy may be cancelled by giving thirty days written notice.

rewrites: what is the limit of liability?
what is the maximum amount payable under a claim?
hypothetical_answer: The maximum amount payable in respect of any claim is limited to the insured declared value.

rewrites: when is a claim considered settled?
what constitutes settlement of a claim?
hypothetical_answer: A claim is deemed settled upon payment of the assessed amount.

rewrites: what happens if the vehicle cannot be driven?
towing arrangements for an immobilised vehicle
hypothetical_answer: If the vehicle is not driveable, towing to an authorised garage will be arranged.

rewrites: what is the own damage excess?
what deductible applies to an own damage claim?
hypothetical_answer: The own damage excess payable is a fixed amount per claim.

rewrites: what is the own damage excess?
what deductible applies to an own damage claim?
hypothetical_answer: The own damage excess payable is a fixed amount per claim.

rewrites: is a replacement vehicle provided while repairs are carried out?
courtesy car provision during repairs
hypothetical_answer: A courtesy car is provided for the duration of repairs.

rewrites: who is the assigned claims handler?
name of the handler managing my claim
hypothetical_answer: Your claim is being handled by the assigned claims handler.

rewrites: what no-claim bonus applies after five claim-free years?
no-claim bonus percentage after five years
hypothetical_answer: After five consecutive claim-free years the no-claim bonus is fifty percent.

rewrites: does the cover extend outside the country?
geographical limits of the policy
hypothetical_answer: Cover extends to driving outside the country subject to conditions.

rewrites: how can an additional driver be added to the policy?
adding a named driver to the policy
hypothetical_answer: An additional driver may be added to the policy on request.

rewrites: is a premium discount available for fitting a dashcam?
discount for an approved dashcam
hypothetical_answer: A discount is available where an approved dashcam is fitted.

rewrites: what is the procedure to transfer the policy on sale of the vehicle?
policy transfer on change of ownership
hypothetical_answer: The policy may be transferred to the new owner on application.

rewrites: is engine damage caused by water ingress covered?
cover for hydrostatic lock damage
hypothetical_answer: Engine damage caused by waterlogging is covered under the policy.

rewrites: what is the renewal premium for next year?
next year's premium amount
hypothetical_answer: The renewal premium for next year will be the stated amount.

rewrites: are personal belongings stolen from the vehicle covered?
theft of personal effects from the car
hypothetical_answer: Personal belongings stolen from the vehicle are covered up to a limit.
